chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1242 of 2014 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Application in disposed of case For orders on CMA No.7628/2021 (U/A) 10-11-2021 Mr. Abdul Rauf Hulio, Advocate for the Petitioners <><><><><>....<><><><><> 1. Urgency granted. CMA No.7629/2021 is taken up for orders. Through this Application, the Petitioners seek recalling of order dated 13-11-2019 whereby this Petition was dismissed for non-prosecution. The said order reads as under;- “None present for the petitioners, nor any intimation has been received. On the last date of hearing a brief was held by Mr. Abdul Waheed Bhanbhro on behalf of Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro Counsel for petitioners and sought time. At his request matter was adjourned with note of caution that if no one appeared on behalf of the petitioners on the next date or learned Counsel avoids to proceed with the matter, this petition will be dismissed for non-prosecution. Today position is same neither petitioners nor their Counsel is in attendance. Absence of petitioners and their Counsel show that they have lost interest to proceed with instant petition, therefore, instant petition is dismissed on account of non-prosecution.” We have gone through the contents of the Application and do not see any justifiable ground, whereas, there is delay of almost 02 years in filing of this Application, which has also gone unexplained. In the circumstances, no case for indulgence is made-out, therefore, the Application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
